name: RCEP 2020 (Regional Comprehensive Economic Partnership)
summary: The Regional Comprehensive Economic Partnership (RCEP) Agreement is a regional supranational meta-framework foundational-RCEP-treaty framework adopted by the 15 founding Asia-Pacific states virtually-from-Hanoi — structurally distinctive globally as the largest free trade agreement globally by GDP framework + only modern Asia-Pacific regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal ASEAN-Plus-Five Asia-Pacific framework (RCEP Agreement signed 15 November 2020 virtually-from-Hanoi Vietnam by 15 Asia-Pacific states + effective 1 January 2022 for first 10 ratifiers + ASEAN+3 + ASEAN+6 predecessor framework — formal foundational RCEP treaty framework establishing comprehensive ASEAN-Plus-Five framework, distinct from rest-of-modern-regional-treaty frameworks which operate without ASEAN-Plus-Five framework, structurally distinctive globally as the largest free trade agreement globally by GDP framework with USD ~26 trillion combined GDP framework + ~2.3 billion population framework + ~30% global GDP framework + ~30% global population framework + only modern Asia-Pacific regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal ASEAN-Plus-Five Asia-Pacific framework with 10 ASEAN + Australia + China + Japan + Korea + New Zealand framework + only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal India-withdrawal-from-negotiations framework via India withdrew from RCEP negotiations 4 November 2019 framework + China-led-RCEP-vs-US-led-CPTPP geopolitical framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal RCEP ASEAN-Plus-Five framework (RCEP framework providing formal ASEAN-Plus-Five framework: 10 ASEAN + Australia + China + Japan + Korea + New Zealand — formal foundational ASEAN-Plus-Five framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern Asia-Pacific regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal ASEAN-Plus-Five framework + first formal China-Japan-Korea trilateral free-trade framework via RCEP framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal RCEP Rules of Origin Cumulation framework (RCEP Chapter 3 framework providing formal rules-of-origin cumulation framework allowing inputs from any RCEP party to count toward originating status — formal foundational RCEP rules-of-origin cumulation framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern Asia-Pacific regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal single-cumulation-area rules-of-origin framework), and as the central jurisdiction of the formal RCEP India Withdrawal framework (India withdrew from RCEP negotiations 4 November 2019 at Bangkok ASEAN Summit + RCEP Joint Leaders' Statement noted India open to rejoining framework + India non-RCEP-member framework as of 2026 — formal foundational RCEP India-withdrawal framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal major-state-withdrawal-from-negotiations framework). The RCEP Agreement is binding upon 15 RCEP member states as of 2026 (Australia + Brunei + Cambodia + China + Indonesia + Japan + Korea + Laos + Malaysia + Myanmar + New Zealand + Philippines + Singapore + Thailand + Vietnam) — comprehensive Asia-Pacific regional coverage framework. The Agreement is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label, though formal RCEP framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal Asia-Pacific trade framework not directly addressing family-law-issues framework. The RCEP Joint Committee + RCEP Secretariat + RCEP Working Groups are the formal RCEP bodies; national-level apex courts operate as judicial bodies. The RCEP Agreement is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label.

statutory_framework.title: RCEP Agreement
statutory_framework.relevance: Regional Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement signed 15 November 2020 virtually-from-Hanoi Vietnam + effective 1 January 2022 for first 10 ratifiers — formal foundational RCEP treaty framework establishing comprehensive ASEAN-Plus-Five framework.

statutory_framework.citation: RCEP Chapter 3 (Rules of Origin Cumulation Framework)
statutory_framework.title: RCEP Chapter 3
statutory_framework.relevance: RCEP Chapter 3 framework on rules-of-origin cumulation allowing inputs from any RCEP party to count toward originating status — formal foundational RCEP rules-of-origin cumulation framework.

statutory_framework.title: RCEP Chapter 19
statutory_framework.relevance: RCEP Chapter 19 framework on state-state dispute settlement following WTO Dispute Settlement Understanding model — formal foundational RCEP dispute-settlement framework.

statutory_framework.citation: RCEP Joint Leaders' Statement 2019 (India Withdrawal Framework)
statutory_framework.title: RCEP Joint Leaders' Statement 2019
statutory_framework.relevance: RCEP Joint Leaders' Statement 4 November 2019 at Bangkok ASEAN Summit noting India's withdrawal from RCEP negotiations + India open to rejoining framework — formal foundational RCEP India-withdrawal framework.

apex_courts.name: RCEP Joint Committee
apex_courts.role: Formal supreme decision-making body for RCEP.

apex_courts.name: RCEP Dispute Settlement Panels
apex_courts.role: Apex RCEP dispute-settlement framework body via Chapter 19 framework.

anonymisation_convention: RCEP-related communications via RCEP Dispute Settlement Panels framework operate via state-state framework following WTO DSU model; individual communications not formally accepted under RCEP framework.

key_developments.title: ASEAN Free Trade Area (AFTA) foundation
key_developments.description: ASEAN Free Trade Area (AFTA) established 28 January 1992 at 4th ASEAN Summit Singapore via Agreement on the Common Effective Preferential Tariff Scheme (CEPT) — pivotal foundation framework for subsequent ASEAN-centred regional trade frameworks including ASEAN+3 + ASEAN+6 + RCEP. Foundation for ~30-year ASEAN-centred regional trade architecture leading to RCEP.

key_developments.title: ASEAN+3 + ASEAN+6 frameworks
key_developments.description: ASEAN+3 China + Japan + Korea + ASEAN+6 Australia + China + India + Japan + Korea + New Zealand frameworks operational from 2005 — predecessor framework to RCEP.

key_developments.title: ASEAN Charter entry into force + institutional foundation
key_developments.description: ASEAN Charter entered into force 15 December 2008 — pivotal modern institutional foundation framework cementing ASEAN as juridical entity + foundation for subsequent ASEAN-centred RCEP negotiations launched 2012 + ASEAN-centrality principle codified in RCEP framework.

key_developments.title: RCEP negotiations launched
key_developments.description: RCEP negotiations launched 20 November 2012 at 21st ASEAN Summit in Phnom Penh Cambodia by 10 ASEAN + Australia + China + India + Japan + Korea + New Zealand 16 founding states — formal RCEP negotiation framework operational.

key_developments.title: US withdrawal from TPP + RCEP momentum acceleration
key_developments.description: US withdrawal from Trans-Pacific Partnership 23 January 2017 by President Trump Executive Order — pivotal modern context accelerating RCEP momentum framework as remaining Asia-Pacific regional binding-treaty trade framework + foundation for subsequent 2019 India withdrawal + 2020 RCEP Agreement signing framework.

key_developments.title: India withdraws from RCEP negotiations
key_developments.description: India withdrew from RCEP negotiations 4 November 2019 at Bangkok ASEAN Summit — formal RCEP India-withdrawal framework operational.

key_developments.title: RCEP Agreement signed
key_developments.description: RCEP Agreement signed 15 November 2020 virtually-from-Hanoi Vietnam by 15 Asia-Pacific states — formal foundational RCEP treaty framework adopted.

key_developments.title: RCEP Agreement enters force
key_developments.description: RCEP Agreement entered force 1 January 2022 for first 10 ratifiers — formal foundational RCEP treaty framework operational.

key_developments.title: RCEP Agreement enters force for all 15 RCEP states
key_developments.description: RCEP Agreement entered force for Philippines 2 June 2023 + Myanmar 4 March 2024 + final RCEP entry-into-force framework — formal RCEP all-15-member framework operational.

key_developments.title: RCEP first-comprehensive-review + Hong Kong-formal-accession-application + Indo-Pacific-Economic-Framework-IPEF intersection
key_developments.description: RCEP first comprehensive review framework 2025 + Hong Kong formal accession application January 2025 substantively significant institutional context + India non-RCEP-member continuing framework + IPEF (Indo-Pacific Economic Framework) US-led 14-member parallel framework intersection context. RCEP Joint Committee + RCEP Secretariat Jakarta institutional positions addressing PA-related issues within RCEP Chapter 3 Rules of Origin Cumulation + Chapter 19 Dispute Settlement framework. Substantively significant Asia-Pacific supranational-binding-treaty institutional jurisprudential development.

key_developments.title: RCEP Secretariat established + Sri Lanka + Hong Kong + Chile applications
key_developments.description: RCEP Secretariat established 2024 in Jakarta Indonesia + Sri Lanka + Hong Kong + Chile applications for RCEP accession 2024 — formal RCEP institutional + expansion framework operational.

structural_findings: RCEP Agreement operates a regional supranational binding-treaty framework — places RCEP Agreement in the regional supranational-meta-framework cluster.

Largest free trade agreement globally by GDP framework + only modern Asia-Pacific regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal ASEAN-Plus-Five Asia-Pacific framework is structurally distinctive globally — largest free trade agreement globally by GDP framework with USD ~26 trillion combined GDP framework + ~2.3 billion population framework + ~30% global GDP framework + ~30% global population framework + only modern Asia-Pacific regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal ASEAN-Plus-Five framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal RCEP ASEAN-Plus-Five framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern Asia-Pacific regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal ASEAN-Plus-Five framework + first formal China-Japan-Korea trilateral free-trade framework via RCEP framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal RCEP Rules of Origin Cumulation framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern Asia-Pacific regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal single-cumulation-area rules-of-origin framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal RCEP India Withdrawal framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal major-state-withdrawal-from-negotiations framework.
15 RCEP member state ratification framework with India-withdrawal framework is structurally distinctive globally — comprehensive Asia-Pacific regional coverage framework.

2005 ASEAN+3 + ASEAN+6 + 2012 RCEP negotiations launched + 2019 India withdraws + 2020 RCEP Agreement signed + 2022 RCEP entry into force + 2023 Philippines + 2024 Myanmar + Secretariat + Sri Lanka + Hong Kong + Chile applications RCEP-framework-development sequence is structurally distinctive globally.

RCEP Agreement + Chapter 3 Rules of Origin Cumulation + Chapter 19 Dispute Settlement + Joint Leaders' Statement India Withdrawal formal quartet framework with limited PA-intersection framework via formal Asia-Pacific trade framework not directly addressing family-law-issues framework — distinctive in operating limited PA-intersection framework relative to other regional frameworks.
editorial_notes: RCEP jurisdiction sidecar — regional supranational Asia-Pacific foundational-RCEP-treaty meta-framework (RCEP Agreement 2020/2022 + Chapter 3 Rules of Origin Cumulation + Chapter 19 Dispute Settlement + ASEAN+3 + ASEAN+6 predecessor + 2012 negotiations launched + 2019 India withdrawal + 2023 Philippines + 2024 Myanmar + Secretariat Jakarta + Sri Lanka + Hong Kong + Chile applications). Largest free trade agreement globally by GDP framework + only modern Asia-Pacific regional supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal ASEAN-Plus-Five Asia-Pacific framework globally + USD ~26 trillion combined GDP + ~2.3 billion population + ~30% global GDP + ~30% global population + central jurisdiction of formal ASEAN-Plus-Five framework + first formal China-Japan-Korea trilateral free-trade framework + central jurisdiction of formal single-cumulation-area rules-of-origin framework + central jurisdiction of formal India-withdrawal framework + 15 RCEP member states + 2005 ASEAN+3 + ASEAN+6 + 2012 RCEP negotiations + 2019 India withdraws + 2020 RCEP Agreement signed + 2022 entry into force + 2023 Philippines + 2024 Myanmar + Secretariat + Sri Lanka + Hong Kong + Chile applications RCEP-framework-development sequence.

PA-recognition: silent statutory + no-apex-position + silent regulator. NOTE: RCEP framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal Asia-Pacific trade framework not directly addressing family-law-issues framework — distinctive in operating limited PA-intersection framework relative to other regional frameworks.

Joins regional + supranational + Asia-Pacific-foundational-RCEP-treaty cluster + RCEP-largest-free-trade-agreement-globally-by-GDP-globally-distinctive + ASEAN-Plus-Five-framework + 10-ASEAN-plus-Australia-China-Japan-Korea-New-Zealand + USD-26-trillion-combined-GDP + 2.3-billion-population + 30-percent-global-GDP + 30-percent-global-population + first-China-Japan-Korea-trilateral-free-trade-via-RCEP + China-led-RCEP-vs-US-led-CPTPP-geopolitical + India-withdrawal-from-negotiations-2019-Bangkok + India-open-to-rejoining + 15-RCEP-member-states + RCEP-Secretariat-Jakarta-2024 + 2005-ASEAN+3-ASEAN+6-predecessor + 2012-Phnom-Penh-negotiations-launched + 2020-virtual-Hanoi-signing + 2022-first-10-ratifiers + 2024-Sri-Lanka-Hong-Kong-Chile-accession-applications + limited-PA-intersection-via-Asia-Pacific-trade-framework-not-directly-addressing-family-law clusters within the corpus.
